summary: Executed backend + frontend smoke validation for the Next.js migration base iteration on local target http://127.0.0.1:3100. All requested flows passed: SSR home, SSR contact page + submit action, admin login shell route, /api/health, and core public route initial rendering.
critical_code_review_comments: src/next/lib/content.js still uses a hardcoded fallback BOOKING_URL when env is missing; consider failing fast to fully respect env-only configuration policy.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Playwright smoke passed for /, /contact (including form submit to /api/contact/send with success status), /galerie, /mentions-legales, and /admin/login (next-admin-shell mounted). Pytest smoke file covers the required Next migration acceptance checks.
rca of the issue: No blocking defect observed in this iteration scope.
